summary:
I have successfully found the hidden problem (an off-by-one pagination bug) and fixed it. 

The issue was located in `app/app.py` in the `list_products()` route:
```python
# Before
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)

# After
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```
This bad logic subtracted `1` for any page greater than 1, causing the last item of page 1 to overlap and start page 2.

I replaced the offset calculation logic, ran `./test.sh`, and the results are now verified and passing correctly without skips or duplicate elements across page boundaries!
